intention: 上司/老师表扬我某方面的表现
avoidSaying: give praise to me because performance is well
sentencePatterns: My [manager/teacher] praised me for my ___ performance.
realLifeExamples: My team leader praised me for my strong performance in the last sprint.
The teacher praised her for her clear explanation.
productionPrompts: 你怎么描述被人表扬？用 praised me for my ___ 说出来。
